---
title: "Sequential Overlap"
author: "Skylar Zeng"
date: "2025-07-23"
output: html_document
---

## Sequential Overlap Detection
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

library("readr")
library("tidyverse")
library("readxl")
library("here")
library("RColorBrewer")
library("knitr")
library("ggthemes")
library(data.table)
```

```{r import-data, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
############################
# import relevant datasets
############################
ids <- read_csv(here('data','metadata','cleaned_passed_genomeid.csv'), col_names = FALSE)$X1

patient_data <- read_csv(here("data","metadata", "hospital_onset_data.csv")) %>%
  filter(genome_id %in% ids)

mlst_data <- read_tsv(here("data", "metadata", "mlst_replaced.tsv")) %>%
  mutate(ST = str_remove(ST, "\\*"))

main_wiens<- read_tsv(here("data", "metadata", "main_from_wiens_group_filtered_cdiff_cases.tsv")) %>%
  arrange(PatientID, Date)

# patient locations
locations <- read_tsv(here('data', 'metadata', 'locations_from_wiens_group_filtered.tsv'))

#patient ids
pateint_ids <- read_csv(here('data', 'metadata', 'sampleid_patientid.csv'))
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
ids_filtered <- pateint_ids %>%
  filter(sample_id %in% patient_data$sample_id)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
locations_filtered <- locations %>% 
  left_join(patient_data, by = c("PatientID" = "RDW_patient_id")) %>% 
  filter(EndDate > StartDate, StartDate >= "2016-02-02" & StartDate <= "2017-12-31")
```

```{r merge-datasets, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}
##############################
# to those that are sequenced
##############################
patient_and_mlst <- inner_join(patient_data, mlst_data, by = "genome_id")
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}
locations_with_st <- locations_filtered %>% 
  left_join(patient_and_mlst, by = c("PatientID" = "RDW_patient_id")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(ST), EndDate > StartDate, StartDate < "2018-01-01") %>%
  select(-ends_with(".y")) %>%
  rename_with(~ sub("\\.x$", "", .), ends_with(".x")) %>%
  distinct()
# Convert to data.table
df <- locations_with_st %>%
  select(PatientID, FacilityCode, Unit, Room, StartDate, EndDate, ST, clade) %>%
  distinct()
dt <- as.data.table(df)
```

### Same Unit
```{r}
# Sort by Facility, Unit, StartDate
setorder(dt, FacilityCode, Unit, StartDate)

# Within each unit, find next stay (ignore Room)
sequential_unit <- dt[, .SD[order(StartDate)], by = .(FacilityCode, Unit)][
  , `:=`(next_PatientID = shift(PatientID, type = "lead"),
         next_StartDate = shift(StartDate, type = "lead"),
         next_EndDate = shift(EndDate, type = "lead"),
         next_ST = shift(ST, type = "lead"),
         next_clade = shift(clade, type = "lead"),
         next_Room = shift(Room, type = "lead")),
  by = .(FacilityCode, Unit)
][
  !is.na(next_PatientID) & PatientID != next_PatientID & EndDate <= next_StartDate
][
  , time_between_days := as.integer(difftime(next_StartDate, EndDate, units = "days"))
]
```

### Same Room
```{r}
# Sort by Facility, Unit, Room, StartDate
setorder(dt, FacilityCode, Unit, Room, StartDate)

# Within each room, find next stay
sequential_room <- dt[, .SD[order(StartDate)], by = .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room)][
  , `:=`(next_PatientID = shift(PatientID, type = "lead"),
         next_StartDate = shift(StartDate, type = "lead"),
         next_EndDate = shift(EndDate, type = "lead"),
         next_ST = shift(ST, type = "lead"),
         next_clade = shift(clade, type = "lead")),
  by = .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room)
][
  !is.na(next_PatientID) & PatientID != next_PatientID & EndDate <= next_StartDate
][
  , time_between_days := as.integer(difftime(next_StartDate, EndDate, units = "days"))
]
```

### Visualization
```{r, warning=FALSE}
# Long format for Unit
unit_long <- rbind(
  sequential_unit[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, PatientID, StartDate, EndDate, ST)],
  sequential_unit[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, PatientID = next_PatientID,
                      StartDate = next_StartDate, EndDate = next_EndDate, ST = next_ST)]
) %>% distinct()

unit_long[, UnitID := paste(FacilityCode, Unit, sep = "_")]


## Long format for Room
room_long <- rbind(
  sequential_room[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, PatientID, StartDate, EndDate, ST)],
  sequential_room[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, PatientID = next_PatientID,
                      StartDate = next_StartDate, EndDate = next_EndDate, ST = next_ST)]
) %>% distinct()

room_long[, RoomID := paste(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, sep = "_")]
```
### Summary Table
```{r}
library(data.table)

# 1. Summary for sequential overlaps in same Unit
summary_unit <- sequential_unit[
  , .(
    n_pairs = .N,
    min_days = min(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_days = max(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_days = round(mean(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_days = median(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
]

# 2. Summary for sequential overlaps in same Room
summary_room <- sequential_room[
  , .(
    n_pairs = .N,
    min_days = min(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_days = max(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_days = round(mean(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_days = median(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
]

# 3. Combine into one summary table
summary_table <- rbind(
  data.table(type = "Same Unit", summary_unit),
  data.table(type = "Same Room", summary_room)
)

# 4. Display
summary_table
```

### Sensitivity Test
```{r}
cutoffs <- c(7, 14, 30, 60)

unit_sensitivity <- lapply(cutoffs, function(cutoff) {
  sequential_unit[time_between_days <= cutoff, .N]
}) %>%
  unlist()

unit_sensitivity_df <- data.table(
  Cutoff_Days = cutoffs,
  N_Pairs = unit_sensitivity,
  Total_Pairs = nrow(sequential_unit),
  Percent_Included = round(100 * unit_sensitivity / nrow(sequential_unit), 1)
)

room_sensitivity <- lapply(cutoffs, function(cutoff) {
  sequential_room[time_between_days <= cutoff, .N]
}) %>%
  unlist()

room_sensitivity_df <- data.table(
  Cutoff_Days = cutoffs,
  N_Pairs = room_sensitivity,
  Total_Pairs = nrow(sequential_room),
  Percent_Included = round(100 * room_sensitivity / nrow(sequential_room), 1)
)

unit_sensitivity_df[, Type := "Same Unit"]
room_sensitivity_df[, Type := "Same Room"]

sensitivity_summary <- rbind(unit_sensitivity_df, room_sensitivity_df)
sensitivity_summary
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(sensitivity_summary, aes(x = Cutoff_Days, y = Percent_Included, color = Type)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Sensitivity Analysis of Sequential Overlap Cutoffs",
       x = "Cutoff (days between stays)",
       y = "Percent of Sequential Pairs Included",
       color = "Type") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = cutoffs) +
  theme_minimal()
```
#### Same ST
```{r}
summary_sameST_unit <- sameST_unit[
  , .(
    n_pairs = .N,
    min_days = min(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_days = max(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_days = round(mean(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_days = median(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
]

summary_sameST_room <- sameST_room[
  , .(
    n_pairs = .N,
    min_days = min(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_days = max(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_days = round(mean(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_days = median(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
]

summary_sameST_table <- rbind(
  data.table(type = "Same Unit (Same ST)", summary_sameST_unit),
  data.table(type = "Same Room (Same ST)", summary_sameST_room)
)

summary_sameST_table
```
```{r}
cutoffs <- c(7, 14, 30)

sameST_unit_sensitivity <- lapply(cutoffs, function(cutoff) {
  sameST_unit[time_between_days <= cutoff, .N]
}) %>% unlist()

sameST_unit_df <- data.table(
  Cutoff_Days = cutoffs,
  N_Pairs = sameST_unit_sensitivity,
  Total_Pairs = nrow(sameST_unit),
  Percent_Included = round(100 * sameST_unit_sensitivity / nrow(sameST_unit), 1),
  Type = "Same Unit (Same ST)"
)

sameST_room_sensitivity <- lapply(cutoffs, function(cutoff) {
  sameST_room[time_between_days <= cutoff, .N]
}) %>% unlist()

sameST_room_df <- data.table(
  Cutoff_Days = cutoffs,
  N_Pairs = sameST_room_sensitivity,
  Total_Pairs = nrow(sameST_room),
  Percent_Included = round(100 * sameST_room_sensitivity / nrow(sameST_room), 1),
  Type = "Same Room (Same ST)"
)

sameST_sensitivity_table <- rbind(sameST_unit_df, sameST_room_df)
sameST_sensitivity_table
```

## Visualization (30 days cutoff)
```{r}
# Show sequential transitions with ≤30 days between stays
sequential_transfers_unit <- sequential_unit[time_between_days <= 90]

# Example output
sequential_transfers_unit[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room,
                         from = PatientID, to = next_PatientID,
                         from_end = EndDate, to_start = next_StartDate,
                         time_between_days,
                         ST, next_ST, clade, next_clade)]

sameST_unit <- sequential_transfers_unit[ST == next_ST]
sameST_unit[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room,
                         from = PatientID, to = next_PatientID,
                         from_end = EndDate, to_start = next_StartDate,
                         time_between_days,
                         ST, next_ST, clade, next_clade)]

# Show sequential transitions with ≤30 days between stays
sequential_transfers_room <- sequential_room[time_between_days <= 90]

# Example output
sequential_transfers_room[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room,
                         from = PatientID, to = next_PatientID,
                         from_end = EndDate, to_start = next_StartDate,
                         time_between_days,
                         ST, next_ST, clade, next_clade)]

sameST_room <- sequential_transfers_room[ST == next_ST]
sameST_room[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room,
                         from = PatientID, to = next_PatientID,
                         from_end = EndDate, to_start = next_StartDate,
                         time_between_days,
                         ST, next_ST, clade, next_clade)]
```

### Sequential overlaps by Unit
```{r, warning=FALSE}
ggplot(unit_long, aes(x = StartDate, xend = EndDate, 
                      y = UnitID, yend = UnitID, 
                      color = as.factor(ST))) +
  geom_segment(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Sequential Stays in Same Unit", 
       x = "Date", y = "Unit", color = "ST") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6))
```

### Sequential overlaps by Room
```{r, warning=FALSE}
ggplot(unit_long, aes(x = StartDate, xend = EndDate, 
                      y = UnitID, yend = UnitID, 
                      color = as.factor(ST))) +
  geom_segment(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Sequential Stays in Same Unit", 
       x = "Date", y = "Unit", color = "ST") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6))
```
### Same ST by unit
```{r, warning=FALSE}
unit_long_sameST <- rbind(
  sameST_unit[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, PatientID, StartDate, EndDate, ST)],
  sameST_unit[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, PatientID = next_PatientID,
                  StartDate = next_StartDate, EndDate = next_EndDate, ST = next_ST)]
) %>% distinct()

unit_long_sameST[, UnitID := paste(FacilityCode, Unit, sep = "_")]

ggplot(unit_long_sameST, aes(x = StartDate, xend = EndDate, 
                             y = UnitID, yend = UnitID, 
                             color = as.factor(ST))) +
  geom_segment(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Sequential Stays in Same Unit (Same ST)", 
       x = "Date", y = "Unit", color = "ST") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6))
```
### Same ST by Room
```{r, warning=FALSE}
room_long_sameST <- rbind(
  sameST_room[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, PatientID, StartDate, EndDate, ST)],
  sameST_room[, .(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, PatientID = next_PatientID,
                  StartDate = next_StartDate, EndDate = next_EndDate, ST = next_ST)]
) %>% distinct()

room_long_sameST[, RoomID := paste(FacilityCode, Unit, Room, sep = "_")]

ggplot(room_long_sameST, aes(x = StartDate, xend = EndDate, 
                             y = RoomID, yend = RoomID, 
                             color = as.factor(ST))) +
  geom_segment(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Sequential Stays in Same Room (Same ST)", 
       x = "Date", y = "Room", color = "ST") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5))
```
```{r}
library(data.table)

# Choose your same-ST data
# sameST_df <- sameST_unit   # for unit-based
sameST_df <- sameST_room     # for room-based

# Calculate summary stats for each ST
summary_by_ST <- sameST_df[
  , .(
    n_pairs = .N,
    min_days = as.numeric(min(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE)),
    max_days = as.numeric(max(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE)),
    mean_days = round(mean(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_days = as.numeric(median(time_between_days, na.rm = TRUE))
  ),
  by = .(ST)
][order(n_pairs)]

# Show table
summary_by_ST
```
